title: botrychium schaffneri
intro: Botrychium schaffneri, also known as Schaffner's grape fern or Schaffner's rattlesnake fern, is a type of rare and endangered flowering plant in the genus Botrychium. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Botrychium schaffneri include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support the immune system. Botrychium schaffneri is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, although its availability is limited due to its rarity and conservation status.
